comment: We have been using Mean Green for the past 2 years for our lawn/bed maintenace and also for some rock landscaping. Always amazed at how well the communication process is from the start to finish. Denise and Evelin do a great job making sure your questions are answered and the work is satisfactory. I’ve never had to complain about something not being done. Carlos is always so professional and helpful as well when calling the office for any scheduling or billing questions. This is a GREAT company and team!
draft_response: Thank you for sharing your experience, Cathy. Knowing that the lawn care service met your expectations reinforces the standards we hold every crew to. We appreciate your trust in Black Hill Landscaping.
